Changelog
WordPress.org

Appearance

SendGrailFix WordPress Email Delivery

Stop losing emails to spam folders. SendGrail routes your WordPress emails through reliable SMTP providers so they actually reach the inbox.

Get Started
Features
📡

SMTP Connections

Connect to 13+ SMTP providers including Gmail, SendGrid, Amazon SES, Mailgun, and more. Configure multiple connections with automatic fallback.

📜

Email Logging

Keep a searchable log of every email your site sends. Store full message bodies and attachments for debugging and compliance.

🔀

Smart Routing

Route emails through different SMTP connections based on From address, recipient, or domain. Fine-grained control over which provider handles each message.

🔍

Open & Click Tracking

Track when recipients open your emails and which links they click. Monitor engagement directly from your WordPress dashboard.

🧭

Setup Wizard

Get up and running in under two minutes. The guided wizard detects existing SMTP plugins and migrates your settings automatically.

📊

Weekly Reports

Receive a weekly email summary of delivery stats, failures, and engagement metrics. Stay informed without logging into the dashboard.
